instruction: I need to respond to an email about 'Project proposal'. Find it in my inbox and send this reply: 'Thanks for reaching out! I will review and get back to you.'.

public.subject: Project proposal
public.reply_body: Thanks for reaching out! I will review and get back to you.

solution_commands: email reply --id email_seed_1 --body 'Thanks for reaching out! I will review and get back to you.'

params.reply_body: Thanks for reaching out! I will review and get back to you.
